customer_anxiety_profile: Low emotional investment — motivation not yet anchored. closer_should_know: Robert has no emotional hook to this appointment — his $500 winter bill and $3,500–$4,000 annual spend were captured but never connected to what Monday's call will show him. The closer should open by anchoring on those specific numbers (Robert calculated the annual figure himself for tax purposes, so he owns it) and frame the design as the answer to a question Robert already has. Also confirm whether the sister's co-ownership requires her presence before proceeding to proposal.
